source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The following boxplot summarizes the prices of books at a bookstore. Which of the following is true about the prices of books at this store?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: This store carries more books priced below the mean than above the mean.

choice_map.A: This store carries more books priced above the mean than below the mean.
choice_map.B: This store carries more books priced below the mean than above the mean.
choice_map.C: This store carries about the same number of books at different prices in the entire price range.
choice_map.D: The mean price of books at this store is the same as the median price of books.
choice_map.E: The mean price of books at this store is lower than the median price of books.

extraction_notes: 答案字段为数字索引"1"，无法仅凭该记录确定是0基还是1基，保留原值。
image字段是PIL.Image对象描述，不是图片路径或URL。
